scripts.dev: cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000 & cd frontend && pnpm dev
scripts.install:all: cd backend && uv sync && pnpm --filter x-blog-frontend install
scripts.backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.lint: cd backend && uvx ruff check . --fix && pnpm --filter x-blog-frontend lint
scripts.format: cd backend && uvx ruff format . && pnpm --filter x-blog-frontend format
scripts.clean: rm -f backend/*.db && rm -rf frontend/.next && rm -rf backend/.pytest_cache && rm -rf .ruff_cache backend/.ruff_cache && rm -rf frontend/node_modules/.vite && rm -rf frontend/coverage
